# DesignOps Orchestrator

DesignOps Orchestrator is a modular Gulp 5 workflow for coordinating design tokens, static content, images, SVG sprites, motion assets, styles, scripts, accessibility audits, performance checks, and release packaging.

## Primary use cases

- Convert design-token JSON into generated Sass variables.
- Process Markdown and frontmatter into structured content data.
- Generate AVIF and WebP image variants.
- Optimize source images and SVG assets.
- Build SVG symbol sprites.
- Copy and organize Lottie and Rive motion files.
- Compile Sass and PostCSS output.
- Bundle JavaScript and TypeScript.
- Render Pug templates into HTML.
- Run linting, accessibility, HTML validation, and performance checks.
- Package and version production releases.
- Optionally explain build errors with Google GenAI when configured.

## Technical summary

- Node.js
- Gulp 5
- Pug
- Sass and PostCSS
- Babel, TypeScript, and ESBuild
- BrowserSync
- Lighthouse and Pa11y-oriented audit tooling
- Image, video, SVG, and motion asset tasks

## Repository

https://github.com/Nischhalsubba/design-ops-orchestrator

## Production configuration

Set `SITE_URL` to the canonical deployed domain before running a production build so generated sitemap URLs are correct.

Optional AI error explanations require an API key and should remain a developer-assistance feature rather than an automated authority.
